title: Monthly Maintenance Fee
question: Why was I charged a monthly maintenance fee?
answer: A monthly maintenance fee may be charged if your account does not meet minimum balance or activity requirements. Fees may be waived if you meet specific conditions such as maintaining a minimum balance or having qualifying transactions.
applicability: Applies when account balance or activity does not meet waiver criteria

title: Unexpected Transaction
question: I see a transaction I don’t recognize. What should I do?
answer: If you notice an unfamiliar transaction, review your recent purchases and subscriptions. If you still do not recognize it, you should report it immediately as it may be unauthorized.

title: Password Reset
question: How do I reset my password?
answer: You can reset your password from the login screen by selecting 'Forgot Password' and following the verification steps sent to your registered email or phone.
applicability: Applies when user cannot access account

title: Mobile App Login Issues
question: I cannot log into the mobile app. What should I do?
answer: Ensure your app is updated, verify your credentials, and check your internet connection. If the issue persists, try resetting your password or reinstalling the app.
applicability: Applies to login failures in mobile app

title: Transfer Processing Time
question: How long do bank transfers take?
answer: Transfers between accounts in the same bank are usually instant, while interbank transfers may take 1-3 business days depending on the destination and processing times.

title: Customer Support Hours
question: What are your customer support hours?
answer: Customer support is available 24/7 through chat and phone. Some specialized services may have limited hours.

title: Account Locked
question: My account is locked. How can I regain access?
answer: Accounts may be locked after multiple failed login attempts. You can unlock your account by verifying your identity through the recovery process or contacting support.

title: Refund Processing
question: How long does a refund take?
answer: Refunds typically take 3-5 business days to process after being issued, depending on the merchant and payment method.
applicability: Applies to card or transaction refunds

title: Update Personal Information
question: How can I update my personal information?
answer: You can update your personal details from your account settings in the app or by contacting customer support if verification is required.

title: Card Declined
question: Why was my card declined?
answer: A card may be declined due to insufficient funds, security checks, expired card details, or transaction limits. Check your balance and card status or contact support for more details.
